title: lesquerella alpina var. laevis
intro: Lesquerella alpina var. laevis, also known as the smooth Lesquerella, is a rare and endangered succulent plant species native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Native American medicine, where it has been employed to treat various health issues. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering health benefits such as reducing pain, inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Lesquerella alpina var. laevis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or salves, although its availability is limited due to its rarity and conservation status.
